results.requirement_text: The system shall require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard.

test_cases.title: Verify that after accepting the updated terms, the user can access the dashboard.
test_cases.objective: Validate that the user can access the dashboard after accepting the updated terms.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for accessing the dashboard are available.

steps.expected_result: The user can access the dashboard.

test_cases.expected_result: The user can access the dashboard.
assumptions: Assuming that the updated terms are correctly displayed to the user.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that after accepting the updated terms, the user can access the dashboard.

source_basis: require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard

test_cases.title: Verify that without accepting the updated terms, the user is prevented from accessing the dashboard.
test_cases.objective: Validate that the user is prevented from accessing the dashboard without accepting the updated terms.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for accessing the dashboard are available.

steps.action: Attempt to access the dashboard without accepting the updated terms.
steps.expected_result: The user is prevented from accessing the dashboard.

test_cases.expected_result: The user is prevented from accessing the dashboard.
assumptions: Assuming that the updated terms are correctly displayed to the user.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that without accepting the updated terms, the user is prevented from accessing the dashboard.

source_basis: require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Verify that after accepting the updated terms, the user can access the dashboard.
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the acceptance flow permits dashboard access as required.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Verify that without accepting the updated terms, the user is prevented from accessing the dashboard.
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the system enforces the acceptance requirement.
source_basis: require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard
